ddls:
CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease (e.g., Anthrax, Babesiosis) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease */,
  "incubation_period" TEXT /* The period between exposure to the disease and the appearance of symptoms */,
  "transmission_mode" TEXT /* How the disease is transmitted (e.g., direct contact, vector-borne) */,
  "mortality_rate" REAL /* The percentage of animals that die from the disease */,
  "prevention_methods" TEXT /* Methods to prevent the disease (e.g., vaccination, hygiene practices) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the disease record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the disease record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symptoms" (
  "symptom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symptom */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease the symptom is associated with */,
  "symptom_name" TEXT /* Name of the symptom (e.g., fever, anemia) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the symptom */,
  "severity" TEXT /* The severity of the symptom (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  "onset" TEXT /* The typical time from exposure to the appearance of the symptom */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the symptom record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the symptom record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symptom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symptoms_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnosis" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease the diagnosis is for */,
  "diagnosis_name" TEXT /* Name of the diagnosis (e.g., clinical signs, laboratory tests) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_type" TEXT /* The type of diagnosis (e.g., clinical, laboratory) */,
  "reliability" TEXT /* The reliability of the diagnosis method (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "cost" REAL /* The cost of the diagnosis method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the diagnosis record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the diagnosis record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnosis_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease the treatment is for */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment (e.g., antibiotics, supportive care) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* The type of treatment (e.g., medication, supportive care) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* The typical duration of the treatment */,
  "cost" REAL /* The cost of the treatment */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Potential side effects of the treatment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the treatment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the treatment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease the case is for */,
  "case_date" TEXT /* Date the case was reported */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species affected (e.g., CATTLE) */,
  "origin_db_name" TEXT /* Origin database name (e.g., veteddie_eddie) */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* The unique identifier for the animal affected */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* The unique identifier for the farm where the animal is located */,
  "veterinarian_id" INTEGER /* The unique identifier for the veterinarian handling the case */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* The date when the diagnosis was confirmed */,
  "treatment_start_date" TEXT /* The date when the treatment started */,
  "treatment_end_date" TEXT /* The date when the treatment ended */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* The overall outcome of the case (e.g., recovery, death) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the case record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the case record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_symptoms" (
  "case_symptom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case symptom */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the symptom is associated with */,
  "symptom_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symptom */,
  "present" INTEGER /* Whether the symptom is present (true) or not (false) */,
  "onset_date" TEXT /* The date when the symptom first appeared */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* The severity level of the symptom during the case */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the case symptom record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the case symptom record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_symptom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_symptoms_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_symptoms_symptom_id FOREIGN KEY ("symptom_id") REFERENCES symptoms ("symptom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_diagnosis" (
  "case_diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case diagnosis */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the diagnosis is for */,
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the diagnosis */,
  "result" INTEGER /* Whether the diagnosis result is positive (true) or negative (false) */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* The date when the diagnosis was performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the case diagnosis record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the case diagnosis record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_diagnosis_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_diagnosis_diagnosis_id FOREIGN KEY ("diagnosis_id") REFERENCES diagnosis ("diagnosis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_treatment" (
  "case_treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case treatment */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the treatment is for */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the treatment (e.g., successful, unsuccessful) */,
  "treatment_start_date" TEXT /* The date when the treatment started */,
  "treatment_end_date" TEXT /* The date when the treatment ended */,
  "treatment_dosage" TEXT /* The dosage of the treatment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the case treatment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the case treatment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_treatment_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatment ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_treatment_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., veterinarian, researcher, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_comments" (
  "case_comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case comment */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the comment is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* The type of comment (e.g., follow-up, observation) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_comments_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_files" (
  "case_file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case file */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the file is associated with */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., image, document) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* The size of the file in bytes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the file was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_files_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)
